title: Rich Portuguese Shrimp Stew
description: A silky, umami-packed shrimp stew that balances deep sea flavors with a touch of spice and is low-carb friendly.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the shortening and let it melt, then stir in the minced garlic and diced onion, cooking until translucent.
Add the tomato purée, piri piri sauce, and white wine, stirring to combine and simmer for 3 minutes.
Pour in the fish stock, bring the mixture to a gentle boil, then reduce heat to low.
Stir in the shrimp and a pinch of salt and pepper, covering the pot and simmering until the shrimp are pink and opaque, about 4-5 minutes.
Remove from heat, and stir in the lemon zest for brightness.
Taste and adjust seasoning with additional salt or pepper if desired.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with chopped parsley if available, and enjoy the silky, umami-packed stew.
